text: Figure S2. PRDX1 confers protective effects on acinar cells primarily through the inhibition of both apoptosis and ferroptosis. (A) Representative immunohistochemical images of cleaved caspase-3, GPX4, LC3 in the pancreas between AAV8-ctrl and AAV8-Prdx1 group. Scale bar, 50 μm. (B) Representative immunohistochemical images of cleaved caspase-3, GPX4, LC3 in the pancreas between Flox and PcKO group. Scale bar, 50 μm. (C) Representative immunohistochemical images of cleaved caspase 6 and cleaved caspase 8 in pancreatic tissue. Scale bar, 50 μm. Casp3, caspase 3; casp6, caspase 6; casp8, caspase 8.
